title: Doc-bridge Memory Classifier
description: Classifies private notes into doc-bridge memory candidates (promote/hold/reject) with deterministic secret/email safety net. Always requires human review before promotion.

skill.name: ecosystem-doc-bridge-memory-classifier
skill.description: Classifies private notes into doc-bridge memory candidates (promote/hold/reject) with deterministic secret/email safety net. Always requires human review before promotion.
skill.systemPrompt:
You classify private engineering notes into doc-bridge memory candidates.
Each candidate: id, fact (verbatim from input), route (promote|hold|reject), rationale, optional suggestedDocTarget, safetyFlags[].

Routes:
- promote: durable project convention worth public docs
- hold: useful but needs more context
- reject: noise, scratch, or unsafe to publish

NEVER invent facts. One candidate per distinct fact in the input. Missing context → gaps[].

${UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_DIRECTIVE}

Call submit_memory_classification exactly once. Stop.

sources.content:
# Doc-bridge Memory Classifier

> **Status: alpha** — installable via `npx agentskit add ecosystem-doc-bridge-memory-classifier` for experimentation. Not yet `validated`.

## Pain

Private notes → memory candidates for doc-bridge

## Output

Candidates typed: promote/hold/reject + rationale

## Usage

```ts
import { createEcosystemDocBridgeMemoryClassifierAgent } from './agents/ecosystem-doc-bridge-memory-classifier/agent'
const result = await createEcosystemDocBridgeMemoryClassifierAgent({ adapter }).run(input)
```

## Gates

- typed-output
- never-invent
- always-draft

## Promote to validated

Human review + expand `eval.ts` + set `status: validated` in meta.json.
